arts.sum: According to GiveMeSport, Bayer Leverkusen will not sell Tah during the January transfer window and will instead let him leave on a free transfer at the end of the season. Manchester United have opened talks to sign Bayer Leverkusen centre back Jonathan Tah but won't be able to bring him to Old Trafford in January.
